metadata.name: Manage a New Stock Option Grant

description: A newly promoted employee is receiving a stock option grant as part of their promotion.

nodes.task_description: Receive the approved grant details (number of shares, strike price, vesting schedule).

expected_outcome.value: The compensation analyst receives the grant information.

nodes.task_description: Enter the new grant into the equity administration platform (e.g., Carta, Shareworks).

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully creates the new grant in the system.

nodes.task_description: Generate and send the grant agreement to the employee for acceptance.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst sends the agreement for e-signature.
